cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: I have a client visit next Tuesday and need a quiet room with a proper desk near your tech park branch. Which room type should I look at?

mustInclude: acknowledge the business-trip purpose
anchor the reply in quietness and work setup preference
guide toward stay dates or room-type clarification without overselling

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need 8 rooms for two nights next month and need a company invoice. Can your convention center hotel handle that?

mustInclude: recognize the request as a serious group booking
ask for dates, room mix, and invoice title or billing details
guide toward a clear booking follow-up naturally
mustAvoid: assuming every property handles corporate groups identically

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: My flight lands at 7 am tomorrow. If I book tonight, can I check in early when I arrive?

mustInclude: acknowledge the travel fatigue concern
state that early check-in depends on property and room status
guide toward property, date, and booking details

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I have an evening flight. Can you guarantee late checkout until 6 pm?

mustInclude: acknowledge the departure timing concern
explain that late checkout depends on occupancy or rate conditions
guide toward property and stay-date details

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Do you have a small meeting room with a screen for 12 people next Wednesday afternoon?

mustInclude: treat the request as a real event lead
ask for date, time block, and setup needs such as screen or refreshments
guide toward a concrete follow-up path
mustAvoid: pretending every property has the same meeting setup

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Our colleague lands at 11:30 tonight. Does your airport hotel definitely provide shuttle pickup that late?

mustInclude: acknowledge the late-arrival concern
mention that transfer support depends on property and operating hours
guide toward the exact hotel, date, and pickup details

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: I saw your room on an OTA app. Is breakfast included or do I need to add it separately?
context_window: user may be close to booking

mustInclude: acknowledge the rate-inclusion question
mention that breakfast depends on the room category or rate plan
guide toward the exact plan or booking channel details

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We're driving a van and one EV to your hotel tomorrow. Do you have parking and charging?

mustInclude: acknowledge the arrival-planning need
mention that parking or charging can depend on the property and vehicle setup
guide toward the hotel name and exact vehicle requirement
mustAvoid: guaranteeing a parking space or charger

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I booked a non-refundable room on a third-party app. My schedule changed. Can you refund it anyway?

mustInclude: acknowledge the inconvenience
state that refund handling depends on channel and rate rules
guide toward booking-source and reservation details for the next step
mustAvoid: promising a refund before checking the booking context
treating third-party and direct bookings as identical

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: The room smells smoky and the Wi-Fi keeps dropping. I've called twice already.

mustInclude: empathy first
request the hotel and room or booking details through a safer channel
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: blaming the guest or operations publicly
asking for excessive personal details in comments

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We send consultants every month. If we book 10 nights at a time, do you have a corporate rate?
context_window: user is exploring a longer-term relationship

mustInclude: recognize the recurring business value
ask for expected dates, room volume, and invoice or breakfast needs
guide toward a concrete business-booking follow-up
mustAvoid: treating the request like a one-off room question

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat or phone. I want to lock the room now.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move faster
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request property and stay details as the next action
mustAvoid: replying only with DM me and no context

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Every business hotel says it's quiet and has fast Wi-Fi. Why should I believe yours is any different?

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite a concrete concern like quiet rest, desk setup, or network stability
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going
